density.label: Layout Density
density.description: focused: one concept, 2-3 sections, strong whitespace. rich: comprehensive layouts, full dashboards, multiple data sections. Default is focused to prevent over-engineering.

style.label: Visual Style
style.description: ship: full Ship design tokens, looks native in Studio. neutral: Ship layout/typography with muted neutral palette, use when impersonating another product's visual language. bare: no Ship tokens, write all styles from scratch.

animate.label: Animations
animate.description: Whether to include GSAP entrance animations. Disable for static reference canvases or when animation would distract from the content.
